title: Extracting Email Addresses from Text
scenario: Write a prompt to extract email addresses from a given text. The text may contain multiple email addresses. The output should be a list of extracted email addresses.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code adheres to Python 3 syntax and is correctly formatted.
Verify if the code meets the character limit and uses the correct language syntax.
Check if the code correctly extracts the email addresses from the given text.
